canonical_definition: A benchmark for evaluating community-specific steerability in LLMs using contrasting Reddit communities, comprising over 10,000 instruction-response pairs and 5,500 multiple-choice questions across 30 subreddit pairs and 19 domains.
papers: Unsupervised Word-level Quality Estimation for Machine Translation Through the Lens of Annotators (Dis)agreement

relationships.paper: Unsupervised Word-level Quality Estimation for Machine Translation Through the Lens of Annotators (Dis)agreement
relationships.evidence: we introduce STEER-BENCH, a benchmark designed to evaluate population-specific steering in LLMs. (Section 1)
